title: Arcanasia
description: A modpack centered around fantasy & create
body:
### Welcome to the realm of Arcanasia!

This land is filled with adventures, threats and discoveries for you to explore (Ideally with fellow adventurers, otherwise it might be pretty hard). 

---

This pack's theme is mostly around fantasy. Some of the main mods on that theme are Ice&Fire, Botania, Elementals and Hexcasting. There's also create in the modpack though, which can be used to automate your resource gathering or make really cool builds.

The modpack also features a variety of decoration and QOL mods which enhances the experience. Look out for the ender dragon fight though, there are mods that made it harder!

Hope you have fun :3
